models.title: Register Damper
source_fields: Designed to fit behind your register, our durable steel louver allows you to regulate the flow of the air from your floor vents with a simple open and close design—increasing heating and cooling efficiency throughout your home. Details You'll Appreciate Pairs with our cast iron and steel registers—designed to fit snugly between air vent and register Open and close easily with a flathead screwdriver Available in multiple sizes—measure air duct opening rather than old register or grille to determine your size Product Specifications Steel Floor Mount Only

models.title: Register Louver
source_fields: Designed to fit behind your register, our durable steel louver allows you to regulate the flow of the air from your floor vents with a simple open and close design—increasing heating and cooling efficiency throughout your home. Details You'll Appreciate Pairs with our metal registers—designed to fit snugly between air vent and register Product Specifications White Oak Floor Mount Only

models.title: Classic Scroll Register
source_fields: Inspired by 20th century designs, our cast iron register features a beautiful decorative face that adds an elevated touch to your home’s air vents. Pair yours with a louver to control the flow of air throughout your room. Details You'll Appreciate 20th century-inspired design Product Specifications Cast iron Floor Mount Only Register is for use on floor vents only

Details You'll Appreciate Gridded linear pattern Available in a range of sizes to suit your home's air vents Pair with a Register Louver Product Specifications Steel Floor Mount Only Register is for use on floor vents only

models.title: Surface Mount Wood Register
source_fields: With a classic linear pattern and beveled edge, our wood register adds an elevated touch to your home’s air vents. Pair with a damper to control the flow of air throughout your room. Details You'll Appreciate Linear pattern Product Specifications White oak Floor Mount Only Register is for use on floor vents only Care Instructions While our surface mount wood grilles can be installed in the floor, they are not recommended nor guaranteed for high traffic areas where they will be continually walked on. Flush mount wood grilles are specially made for floor installations

Flush mount wood grilles are specially made for floor installations Floor Mount Only Register is for use on floor vents only
